roles.label: Pracharaka
roles.description: Referral partner who identifies and refers prospective Panchakarma patients from their community.

roles.label: Program Coordinator
roles.description: Sadaika/Ayusurance operations staff managing the end-to-end patient workflow.

roles.label: Ayurveda Doctor
roles.description: Qualified Ayurveda physician conducting eligibility assessments, treatment planning and consultations.

roles.label: Administrator
roles.description: System administrator with full access to all records, configuration and data management.
